Uses of Class
org.moeaframework.util.clustering.ClusterableSolution

Packages that use ClusterableSolution
Package
Description
org.moeaframework.util.clustering
Support for clustering of solutions, either using their decision variables (if numeric) or objective values.

  • Uses of ClusterableSolution in org.moeaframework.util.clustering

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ClusterableSolution
    Cluster.get(int index)
    Returns the clusterable solution at the given index.
    ClusterableSolution
    Cluster.getRepresentativeMember()
    Returns the solution defined to represent this cluster.
    static ClusterableSolution
    ClusterableSolution.withObjectives(Solution solution)
    Constructs a clusterable solution based on the objective values of the solution.
    static ClusterableSolution
    ClusterableSolution.withVariables(Solution solution)
    Constructs a clusterable solution based on the decision variables of the solution.
